classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域显示电机侧视外形、轴端键槽详图、连接器安装方向提示及尺寸标注，可见'36'、'7'、'8'、'55±1'、'170±1.5'、'0.08 A'、'0.04'等尺寸和形位公差信息，属于机械结构尺寸图而非针脚定义或性能曲线。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框在完整标注源图中对应电机前端视图，显示'动力航插'、'编码器航插'及其外形位置，并包含'Ø145±0.2'、'4-Ø9'、'45°'、'□130'等安装孔距和外形尺寸；未给出针脚编号与功能对应关系，因此归入机械尺寸。

text_annotations.correction_note: Inserted space between words; overlapping partial OCR sources ocr_004 and ocr_005 are duplicates and not used.
Inserted space between words; overlapping partial OCR sources ocr_001 and ocr_003 are duplicates and not used.
Corrected OCR leading 0/1 style diameter callout from 0145±0.2 to Ø145±0.2 based on visible diameter symbol.
Corrected OCR 09 to Ø9 for four diameter holes.
Merged square symbol OCR as 口 with 130 into □130.

terminology_notes: Ø/Φ denotes diameter; □ denotes square profile size; connector labels are identification text rather than dimensional values.
translation_notes: MOTOR CONNECTOR translated as 动力连接器; ENCODER CONNECTOR translated as 编码器连接器.

Angular dimension indicates the left-side hole pattern orientation relative to the vertical centerline.
Angular dimension indicates the right-side hole pattern orientation relative to the vertical centerline.
Bottom horizontal dimension line spans the square flange width, with square symbol indicating square profile size.

engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Visible outer flange size is □130; other envelope dimensions are not specified in this crop.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Two top connectors are identified as MOTOR CONNECTOR and ENCODER CONNECTOR by leader callouts.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Thread specifications, connector pin details, shaft dimensions, depth dimensions, and additional tolerances are not specified in this crop.

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框内是动力线接线表，表头含'Pin No'、'Defintion'、'Colour'、'Diameter'，并列出引线号B、I、F、G、C、E与U、V、W、PE、BK+、BK-及线色、16AWG的对应关系，属于动力连接器针脚及接线定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框仅包含表头文字'连接器型号'及英文'Connector Models'，用于标识连接器型号栏位；该裁剪本身没有针脚编号与功能、线色或接线关系定义，按仅展示连接器型号的规则最接近机械尺寸类。

language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Preserve visible source text exactly; do not infer hidden model text from context image.
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: No unit assigned to pin identifiers; millimeters only for explicit mechanical dimensions, none visible here.

terminology_rules.connector_front_face: Connector front face / 连接器正面

ambiguous_terms: BK+ is visually small and partially congested near the top-center pin cluster; retained as visible source text with reduced confidence.
Center marking may read PE but is crowded by contact geometry; retained with ambiguity note.

dimension_records.original_callout: BK+, A, F, B, PE, E, D, C
dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Visible front-face pin markings: BK+, A, B, C, D, E, F, PE.
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 可见连接器正面针位标识：BK+、A、B、C、D、E、F、PE。
dimension_records.inspection_status: Visible but several labels are small and congested
dimension_records.engineering_notes_en: Defines visible connector contact identifiers only; no wiring colors or mating connector model are legible in IMAGE 1 crop.
dimension_records.engineering_notes_zh: 仅记录图1裁剪区域内可见触点标识；线色和配套连接器型号在图1中不可辨识。
dimension_records.ambiguity_notes: BK+ and PE have lower confidence due to overlap with dense connector graphics.

frontend_table_records.specification: Visible front-face pin markings: BK+, A, B, C, D, E, F, PE.

audit_table_records.original_callout: BK+, A, F, B, PE, E, D, C
audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 可见连接器正面针位标识：BK+、A、B、C、D、E、F、PE。

mounting_interface.en: The crop shows a square connector flange with four corner mounting holes, but no mounting dimensions are visible in IMAGE 1.
mounting_interface.zh: 裁剪图显示方形连接器法兰及四角安装孔，但图1中未见安装尺寸。

shaft_and_key_interface.en: Not applicable to this connector-detail crop.
shaft_and_key_interface.zh: 该区域为连接器细节，不涉及轴和键接口。

overall_envelope_and_clearance.en: No overall envelope dimensions or clearance dimensions are visible in IMAGE 1.
overall_envelope_and_clearance.zh: 图1中未见外形总尺寸或间隙尺寸。

connector_considerations.en: Visible information supports a circular multi-pin motor connector front face with labeled contacts BK+, A, B, C, D, E, F and PE.
connector_considerations.zh: 可见信息表明该区域为圆形多针动力连接器正面，触点标识包含BK+、A、B、C、D、E、F和PE。

missing_or_unresolved_data.en: Connector model, pin count, shell size, thread, mounting hole diameter, and wiring table values are not legible or not present in IMAGE 1.
missing_or_unresolved_data.zh: 连接器型号、针数、壳体规格、螺纹、安装孔直径及接线表数值在图1中不可读或未出现。

unresolved_items.issue_en: No explicit dimensional callouts are visible in the target crop.
unresolved_items.issue_zh: 目标裁剪图中未见明确尺寸标注。
unresolved_items.impact: dimension_records are limited to visible connector pin annotations.

unresolved_items.issue_en: Right-side connector model text suggested by context is not legible in IMAGE 1 and was not extracted.
unresolved_items.issue_zh: 上下文中提示的右侧连接器型号在图1中不可辨识，因此未提取。
unresolved_items.impact: model identification requires a higher-resolution or less-cropped target image.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为'反馈线 Feedback'的针脚表，列出 A、B、E、F、G、H、J 等引线号与 'SD+'、'SD-'、'VB+'、'VB-'、'+5V'、'GND'、'SHIELD' 及线色的对应关系，并标注线径 '28AWG'，属于反馈连接器信号针脚定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为圆形连接器端面外形图及型号文字'CMS3102A20-29PE009-A'，全图对应左侧连接器型号栏中的反馈线连接器模型；未在该目标框内给出针脚功能、线色或接线对应关系，因此按连接器外形和型号信息归入机械尺寸类。

drawing_metadata.source_image_authority: IMAGE 1 only for text and coordinates; IMAGE 2 context only

language_processing_rules.audit_language: Chinese source text preserved exactly for audit fields; English used for normalized frontend fields
language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Use only visible IMAGE 1 text for text_annotations and dimension_records; do not infer absent callouts
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: Assume millimeters only when explicit dimensions are visible on the target image; do not infer units from context alone
language_processing_rules.terminology_rules: Prefer standard mechanical terms for connector face, mounting hole pattern, flange, and interface features

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: 安装接口：方形法兰、四角安装孔、中央圆形多芯连接器接口 / Mounting interface: square flange, four corner mounting holes, central circular multi-pin connector face.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: 轴与键接口：不适用；该视图未显示轴、键槽或输出轴特征 / Shaft and key interface: not applicable; no shaft, keyway, or output shaft features are visible.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: 外形包络：接近方形安装面，外圈为圆形层叠结构；此裁剪图未给出可读尺寸 / Overall envelope and clearance: near-square mounting face with concentric circular features; no readable dimensions in this crop.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: 连接器注意事项：可见多针插孔/触点阵列、四角紧固点及中心定位结构；具体针位定义需依赖上下文图纸 / Connector considerations: visible multi-pin contact array, four corner fasteners, and a central locating structure; pin assignment must be taken from the full drawing context.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: IMAGE 1 contains no legible text callouts or dimensions; no authoritative numeric extraction is possible from the target crop alone / IMAGE 1 无可读文字标注或尺寸，无法从目标裁剪图可靠提取数值。

unresolved_items.note: The target crop shows only geometry; no authoritative callouts were visible for extraction.
Numeric dimensions appear only in the context image and were not used as source coordinates or text authority.

unresolved_items.item: Connector model text not visible in IMAGE 1
unresolved_items.note: Model text is present only in the context image, so it was not promoted to text_annotations.
